<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("Current nodes of interest:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ['p', 'b', 'W', 'c', 'G']:
        print(f"  id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Check purple block position
p_nodes = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'p']
print(f"\nPurple blocks: {len(p_nodes)}")
for pn in p_nodes:
    print(f"  boundary={pn['boundary']}")

# Check if there's a white cross
w_nodes = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'W' and n['pixels'] < 64]
print(f"White small objects: {len(w_nodes)}")
for wn in w_nodes:
    print(f"  boundary={wn['boundary']} pixels={wn['pixels']}")

# Check gray dots
gray_dots = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'G' and n['pixels'] == 1]
print(f"\nGray dots: {len(gray_dots)}")
for g in sorted(gray_dots, key=lambda x: x['boundary'][0][0]):
    print(f"  pos={g['boundary'][0]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
